nodes.label: Rationale: Tiller collided with Helm v2's Tiller in the target ecosystem; Oiax is the literal Greek for tiller and keeps the hand-on-the-helm intent

nodes.label: ADR 0002: Detect divergence by content, not ancestry
nodes.norm_label: adr 0002: detect divergence by content, not ancestry

nodes.label: Rationale: squash/rebase merges rewrite SHAs; ancestry-only detection leaves edges permanently diverged and PR creation fails with HTTP 422; a private state database would violate the no-control-plane posture
nodes.norm_label: rationale: squash/rebase merges rewrite shas; ancestry-only detection leaves edges permanently diverged and pr creation fails with http 422; a private state database would violate the no-control-plane posture

nodes.label: ADR 0003: Read configuration from a pinned ref
nodes.norm_label: adr 0003: read configuration from a pinned ref

nodes.label: Rationale: config is itself promoted and differs per branch; reading the triggering ref is nondeterministic and lets untrusted PR config run with write credentials
nodes.norm_label: rationale: config is itself promoted and differs per branch; reading the triggering ref is nondeterministic and lets untrusted pr config run with write credentials

links.source_location: build plan step of the loop
edge evaluation will live in internal/engine
design proposal lives in skaphos-resources under tools/oiax/ but is outside this repository
both reconcile environment promotion over Git branches; gitops-promoter is a Kubernetes controller, Oiax is CI-native
the hotfix-return flow is backflow, never reconciliation
backflow identity check reuses the same posture
validate checks the same semantic rules Graph.Validate owns
the same external tool appears as prior-art inspiration and as this repo's release automation
Action downloads the binary and verifies against checksums.txt
the tag pushed by release-please triggers GoReleaser

Entrypoint to Engine to Git layer / Forge provider layering (depguard-enforced, engine never reaches down)
